LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SKYWEST AIRLINES, INC. DOING BUSINESS AS SKYWEST, BETH LOUDERMILK, BRIAN HANDSACKER, FREDERICK ASSILY, YING MEI, FANGAFUA TUIFUA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 FOR NEGLIGENCE. THE COURT CANNOT, AS A MATTER OF LAW, DETERMINE ON THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT THAT THE FAA OR ACAA HAS FIELD PREEMPTION OVER PLAINTIFF'S STATE LAW CLAIM OF NEGLIGENCE. SEE GILSTRAP V. UNITED AIR LINES, INC., (9TH CIR. MAR. 12, 2013, WL 930170. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2 FOR NEGLIGENT HIRING, TRAINING, SUPERVISION, AND RETENTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD ADDITIONAL FACTS TO ESTABLISH A STATE COMMON LAW STANDARD OF CARE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs SKYWEST AIRLINES, INC. DOING BUSINESS AS SKYWEST, BETH LOUDERMILK, BRIAN HANDSACKER, FREDERICK ASSILY, YING MEI, FANGAFUA TUIFUA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled as to cause of action 1 for negligence. The Court cannot, as a matter of law, determine on the face of the complaint that the FAA or ACAA has field preemption over Plaintiff's state law claim of negligence. See Gilstrap v. United Air Lines, Inc., (9th Cir. Mar. 12, 2013, WL 930170. Defendant's demurrer to cause of action 2 for negligent hiring, training, supervision, and retention is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead additional facts to establish a state common law standard of care. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2013 Continued To Mar-29-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
